_doc: Objective corrections to capability flags when LiteLLM is wrong or missing. Keyed by model id; shallow-merged into that model's `capabilities` object and flips `source` to `patch`. Recognized flags: function_calling, vision, prompt_caching, reasoning, response_schema, audio_input, audio_output, web_search, tool_choice, system_messages, parallel_function_calling, pdf_input, computer_use, native_structured_output, video_input, assistant_prefill, code_execution.

_example_remove_underscore_to_use._note: why this correction exists + source link

_claude_prefill_note: Anthropic deprecated assistant prefill starting with Claude 4.6 models — requests with a prefilled last assistant turn return 400. Source: https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering/claude-prompting-best-practices (2026-06-01). LiteLLM correctly marks claude-opus-4-6/4-7/4-8 as false. However claude-sonnet-4-6 is incorrectly marked true in LiteLLM upstream — patched below.

claude-sonnet-4-6._note: LiteLLM upstream incorrectly sets supports_assistant_prefill=true. Anthropic docs confirm prefill is not supported on any Claude 4.6+ model.
